versions.notes: Covered by @opentelemetry/auto-instrumentations-node/register via opentelemetry-instrumentation-express.
Covered by @opentelemetry/auto-instrumentations-node/register via @opentelemetry/instrumentation-fastify.
Covered by @opentelemetry/auto-instrumentations-node/register via @opentelemetry/instrumentation-koa.
Node built-in http module; covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-http shipped inside auto-instrumentations-node.
Node built-in https module; same instrumentation as http.
Global fetch (Node 18+); covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-undici via auto-instrumentations-node.
Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-undici via auto-instrumentations-node.
Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-pg via auto-instrumentations-node.
Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-mysql via auto-instrumentations-node.
Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-mysql2 via auto-instrumentations-node.
Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-mongodb via auto-instrumentations-node.
Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-redis via auto-instrumentations-node. Use ioredis entry for the ioredis client.
Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-ioredis via auto-instrumentations-node.
Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-graphql via auto-instrumentations-node.
Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-grpc via auto-instrumentations-node.
AWS SDK v2; covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-aws-sdk via auto-instrumentations-node.
AWS SDK v3 client; covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-aws-sdk via auto-instrumentations-node.
Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-nestjs-core via auto-instrumentations-node.
Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-hapi via auto-instrumentations-node.
Legacy hapi package; see @hapi/hapi for the current scope. Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-hapi.
Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-restify via auto-instrumentations-node.
Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-connect via auto-instrumentations-node.
Node built-in dns module; covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-dns via auto-instrumentations-node.
Node built-in net module; covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-net via auto-instrumentations-node.
Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-knex via auto-instrumentations-node.

Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-sequelize via auto-instrumentations-node. The bundled coverage requires sequelize as a peer dep of the instrumentation package; if it is absent the instrumentation silently no-ops.
Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-mongoose via auto-instrumentations-node.
Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-socket.io via auto-instrumentations-node.
Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-pino via auto-instrumentations-node; injects trace context into log records.
Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-winston via auto-instrumentations-node; injects trace context into log records.
Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-bunyan via auto-instrumentations-node; injects trace context into log records.
Prisma 6 ships its own OTel instrumentation. Add @prisma/instrumentation@^6.0.0 and register PrismaInstrumentation() in the OTel setup.
Prisma 5 ships its own OTel instrumentation. Add @prisma/instrumentation@^5.0.0 and register PrismaInstrumentation() in the OTel setup.
@vercel/otel ships its own OTel setup and wraps auto-instrumentations internally. NEAT defers to it; do not add a second SDK init alongside it.
LangChain instrumentation is provided by @traceloop/node-server-sdk. Import LangChainInstrumentation from the SDK and register it.
Wraps OpenAI API calls via @traceloop/node-server-sdk. Import OpenAIInstrumentation from the SDK and register it.
Anthropic SDK instrumentation via @traceloop/node-server-sdk. Import AnthropicInstrumentation from the SDK and register it.
LlamaIndex instrumentation via @arizeai/openinference-instrumentation-llamaindex from the Arize AI OpenInference project.
TypeORM is not in the auto-instrumentations-node bundle. Install @opentelemetry/instrumentation-typeorm separately and register TypeormInstrumentation().
Stripe SDK makes HTTPS calls to api.stripe.com; the HTTP auto-instrumentation covers outbound spans. No SDK-level instrumentation package exists.
Twilio SDK makes HTTPS calls to api.twilio.com; captured by HTTP auto-instrumentation.
SendGrid SDK makes HTTPS calls to api.sendgrid.com; captured by HTTP auto-instrumentation.
Resend SDK calls api.resend.com over HTTPS; captured by HTTP auto-instrumentation.
Plaid Node client calls sandbox.plaid.com or production.plaid.com over HTTPS; captured by HTTP auto-instrumentation.
Braintree SDK calls the Braintree API over HTTPS; captured by HTTP auto-instrumentation.
Chargebee Node client calls your-site.chargebee.com over HTTPS; captured by HTTP auto-instrumentation.
Shopify API Node client calls your-store.myshopify.com over HTTPS; captured by HTTP auto-instrumentation.
Official Shopify API library; REST and GraphQL calls go over HTTPS and are captured by HTTP auto-instrumentation.
Clerk SDK calls api.clerk.dev over HTTPS; captured by HTTP auto-instrumentation. The @clerk/nextjs / @clerk/express SDK wrappers share the same transport.
Clerk Next.js SDK; API calls go to api.clerk.dev over HTTPS and are captured by HTTP auto-instrumentation.
Auth0 Node SDK calls your tenant at *.auth0.com over HTTPS; captured by HTTP auto-instrumentation.
LaunchDarkly SDK calls app.launchdarkly.com over HTTPS; captured by HTTP auto-instrumentation. Native OTel support is experimental in LD's SDK.
Split.io SDK calls sdk.split.io over HTTPS; captured by HTTP auto-instrumentation.
PostHog Node SDK calls app.posthog.com or your instance over HTTPS; captured by HTTP auto-instrumentation.
Mixpanel Node client calls api.mixpanel.com over HTTPS; captured by HTTP auto-instrumentation.
Segment Node.js client calls api.segment.io over HTTPS; captured by HTTP auto-instrumentation.
Amplitude Node SDK calls api2.amplitude.com over HTTPS; captured by HTTP auto-instrumentation.
No OTel instrumentation package for Hono exists. Hono's middleware system supports manual span wrapping; see https://hono.dev/guides/opentelemetry for the manual approach.
No OTel instrumentation package for Elysia exists. Elysia runs on Bun; instrument via manual span creation or the http-fallback for outbound calls.
Bun's built-in HTTP server has no OTel instrumentation package. Instrument request handlers manually using the OTel API.
No OTel instrumentation package for better-auth. Auth flows can be traced manually; HTTP calls to external identity providers are covered by HTTP auto-instrumentation.
No OTel instrumentation package for Lucia. Instrument session-management paths manually.
No dedicated OTel instrumentation package for Kysely. A plugin approach is possible manually; no published package covers it yet.
Mastra is a new AI orchestration framework; no OTel instrumentation package exists yet. Instrument agent steps manually.
No published OTel instrumentation package for Drizzle ORM. The underlying database driver (pg, mysql2, etc.) is covered by its own bundled instrumentation; Drizzle's ORM layer is not.
TanStack Start is in early access; no OTel instrumentation package exists. HTTP calls from server functions are captured by HTTP auto-instrumentation.
SolidStart has no OTel instrumentation package. Server-side calls go through the Fetch/HTTP layer captured by auto-instrumentation.
Qwik City server-side rendering has no OTel instrumentation package. Outbound HTTP from server actions is captured by HTTP auto-instrumentation.
Fresh is a Deno framework; Deno is out of scope for NEAT's Node.js runtime target. Noted here for completeness; no Node-compatible instrumentation applies.
Vike (formerly vite-plugin-ssr) has no OTel instrumentation package. Server-side data-fetching calls are captured by HTTP auto-instrumentation where applicable.
Axios uses Node's http/https modules internally; covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-http via auto-instrumentations-node.
node-fetch routes through Node's http/https; covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-http via auto-instrumentations-node.
Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-elasticsearch via auto-instrumentations-node.
Covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-cassandra-driver via auto-instrumentations-node.
The modern @redis/client package is covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-redis-4 via auto-instrumentations-node.
No published OTel instrumentation package for BullMQ. Queue jobs can be traced manually by propagating context into job data and creating spans in processors.
KafkaJS instrumentation via the community opentelemetry-instrumentation-kafkajs package. Not in the auto-instrumentations-node bundle; register separately.
No published OTel instrumentation package for nats.js. Instrument publish/subscribe calls manually using the OTel API.
Firebase Admin SDK calls Firebase REST APIs over HTTPS; captured by HTTP auto-instrumentation. Firestore and RTDB calls are not individually distinguished at the span level.
got v12+ uses Node's built-in fetch; earlier versions use http/https. Both paths are covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-http or instrumentation-undici via auto-instrumentations-node.
superagent uses Node's http/https internally; covered by @opentelemetry/instrumentation-http via auto-instrumentations-node.
